qa_comment: Metadata CSV remains the source of truth for the initial candidate universe.
Allowlist QA artifacts may constrain future pilot candidates when present.
Confirmed extraction QA may support later download manifests when available.
Step 14A gates readiness but does not make features training-final.
Every future download row must include a PDB ID.
Future manifests must not rely on PDB ID alone for event identity.
Residue atom identity is required before extraction and training.
Ligand identifier or HET code is required for future raw download/extraction joins.
Duplicates must be resolved before future pilot download execution.
Excluded candidates stay out of future download manifests with explicit reasons.
